title: IMF: The Global Economy and Financial Stability
description: Official IMF overview of the global macroeconomic outlook, key risks, and policy responses to recurring world economic crises.

title: World Bank: Macroeconomics, Trade, and Investment Overview
description: World Bank analysis of global growth slowdowns, debt vulnerabilities, and structural factors behind economic downturns.

title: OECD Economic Outlook
description: Regular OECD report that examines economic prospects, inflation, employment, and systemic risks across advanced and emerging economies.

title: World Economic Forum: Global Economy Insights
description: Curated articles from the World Economic Forum on financial instability, supply chain disruptions, and long-term impacts of global crises.

title: Financial Times: Global Economy Coverage
description: News and in-depth reporting on recessions, monetary policy shifts, and market stress across major regions.
